description: Semantic boundary notes for bilingual phrases in Bitcoin inscription mirrors. These notes explain evaluation semantics and do not amend the on-chain originals.

boundaries.phrase: 验证此瑕疵。信任其故事。
boundaries.english_canonical: Verify the flaw. Then decide how to read the story.
boundaries.evaluation_reading: 先验证瑕疵，再自行决定如何阅读这个故事
